prompt: A commercial food photography poster for a {argument name="burger type" default="shrimp burger"}. The central burger features a glossy brioche bun, lettuce, white sauce, spicy orange mayo, two grilled shrimp, and a thick crispy breaded patty. It rests on parchment paper on a wooden table, flanked by seasoned french fries on the left and two fried shrimp pieces on the bottom right. A blurred glass of iced cola and a faint {argument name="brand name" default="LOTTERIA"} logo appear in the dark background. The parchment bears a circular "SHRIMP BURGER" stamp. Top left Korean text reads {argument name="top left text" default="탱글한 통새우살이 입안 가득"}. The large central headline is {argument name="main headline" default="통새우 크런KIM버거"} with a small orange shrimp illustration. Below it is the subtitle {argument name="subtitle text" default="매콤바삭, 육즙가득! 올봄, 새우버거의 기준이 바뀐다!"}. The bottom left corner shows the {argument name="brand name" default="LOTTERIA"} logo. Warm, professional studio lighting.
translatedPrompt: 一张专业的虾堡美食摄影广告海报。画面中心是一个高耸、诱人的汉堡，放置在铺着棕色羊皮纸的质朴木桌上。汉堡配有油亮的布里欧修面包、新鲜的绿生菜、奶油白酱、橙色辣味蛋黄酱，以及铺在厚实酥脆虾饼上的整只烤虾。左侧是一堆调味薯条。右前方有两个酥脆的炸虾。右侧模糊的背景中是一杯冰可乐，上面印有淡化的 {argument name="brand name" default="LOTTERIA"} 标志。左上角是粗体、动感的韩文主标题：{argument name="main headline" default="통새우 크런KIM버거"}，旁边有一个小巧的橙色线条虾插图。标题上方的小字写着：{argument name="top text" default="탱글한 통새우살이 입안 가득"}。标题下方是副标题：{argument name="subtitle text" default="매콤바삭; 육즙가득! 올봄, 새우버거의 기준이 바뀐다!"}。羊皮纸上有一个圆形的淡化印章，上面写着“SHRIMP BURGER”并配有虾的图标。左下角是白色的 {argument name="brand name" default="LOTTERIA"} 标志，配有红色方形“L”图标。右下角是小字说明：{argument name="fine print" default="*상기 이미지는 실제 제품과 다를 수 있습니다. *제품 이미지에는 연출된 이미지를 포함하고 있습니다."} 灯光温暖且富有氛围感，突显出诱人的商业快餐广告风格。

breakdown.creativeCore: 快餐虾堡广告海报：生成一张专业且诱人的快餐虾堡广告海报，支持自定义韩文排版和品牌信息。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
